Package org.efs.event

package org.efs.event
Provides core event framework infrastructure for the efs system.

This package defines the contract and mechanisms for efs events, including event definition, building, and de-duplication strategies.

Core Components

Event Contract

  • IEfsEvent: Marker interface that all efs events must implement. Provides the foundational contract for polymorphic event handling.
  • IEfsEventBuilder: Generic builder interface for constructing IEfsEvent instances using the fluent builder pattern.

Event De-duplication

  • ConflationEvent: Mutable event wrapper implementing event conflation (de-duplication) for high-frequency event scenarios. When multiple events arrive for the same topic before processing, only the latest event is retained and forwarded to subscribers. Tracks the count of missed events between polling intervals.

Feed Management

  • EfsTopicKey: Immutable key that uniquely identifies an efs feed by combining event class and topic. Uses instance caching to ensure singleton behavior for identical combinations, enabling efficient feed lookup and management.

Metadata Annotations

  • EfsCollectionInfo: Method-level annotation specifying maximum allowed size for collection or array return types.
  • EfsStringInfo: Method-level annotation specifying the character encoding and maximum byte size for string return types.

Usage Pattern

Typical usage involves:

  1. Implement IEfsEvent to define domain-specific event types.
  2. Create a corresponding IEfsEventBuilder implementation to construct event instances.
  3. For high-frequency updates, use ConflationEvent to de-duplicate events by topic, ensuring only the latest event is processed.
  4. Use EfsTopicKey.getKey(Class, String) to obtain cached feed keys for event routing and subscription management.
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    org.efs.event.type
    Contains EfsEventLayout class which provides a reflective definition of an IEfsEvent class.
  • Class
    Description
    ConflationEvent<E extends IEfsEvent>
    This mutable event allows changing the encapsulated event instance even when this ConflationEvent is posted to an agent event queue.
    EfsCollectionInfo
    Method-level, run-time annotation defining maximum number of elements allowed in a collection or array.
    EfsStringInfo
    Method-level, run-time annotation defining two attributes: charset: defines Charset used to encode/decode associated String type.
    EfsTopicKey<E extends IEfsEvent>
    Immutable key containing efs event class and topic uniquely defining an efs bus feed instance.
    IEfsEvent
    Marker interface denoting that a class is an efs event.
    IEfsEventBuilder<E extends IEfsEvent>
    Interface defines an efs event builder class used to create an IEfsEvent instance.
